---
title: "Multivariate Analysis"
toc: false
---

- [Problem Set 1](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Mutlivariate/Young_ProblemSet1.pdf)

- [Gallaugher HW 2](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Mutlivariate/Slater_2.pdf)

- [Iris LDA 2](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Mutlivariate/Iris_LDA2.pdf)
- [Banknote PCA LDA](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Mutlivariate/banknote_pca_lda.pdf)
